name: EthGetThisFrameCheckSequence
title: EthGetThisFrameCheckSequence
description: The function returns the frame check sequence (fcs) of a received Ethernet packet.
It is only usable in a CAPL callback function that had been registered with EthReceiveRawPacket or EthReceivePacket.
